SEARCH

Class Road

java.lang.Object
Road
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Road>
public class Road extends Object implements Comparable<Road>
This class represents a road through the 2 towns it connects, its distance/weight, and its name.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Road(Town _source, Town _destination, int _weight, String _description)
    constructor for a weighted edge
    Road(Town _source, Town _destination, String _description)
    default constructor that sets up an unweighted edge

  • Constructor Details

    • Road

      public Road(Town _source, Town _destination, String _description)
      default constructor that sets up an unweighted edge
      Parameters:
      _source - start of the edge
      _destination - end of the edge
      _description - name of the edge

    • Road

      public Road(Town _source, Town _destination, int _weight, String _description)
      constructor for a weighted edge
      Parameters:
      _source - start of the edge
      _destination - end of the edge
      _weight - the cost/weight of the edge
      _description - name of the end

  • Method Details

    • contains

      public boolean contains(Town town)
      returns true if the edge contains the given town
      Parameters:
      town - a vertex of the graph
      Returns:
      true only if the edge is connected to the given vertex

      checks if 2 edges/objects are the same
